snippet.title: Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega (Official Video) Vishal Mishra | Aly Goni, Jasmin Bhasin | VYRL Originals
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents the multi award-winning singer-composer Vishal Mishra‚Äôs Tu Bhi Sataya Jayega featuring Bigg Boss fame and popular couple Aly Goni and Jasmin Bhasin. The song has been written by Vishal Mishra and Kaushal Kishore narrating this story from a female perspective. The Music Video has been directed by Navjit Buttar and has been shot in a grand scale. Watch Aly & Jasmin in a never before seen avatar, showcasing skilfully the pain and anguish of a toxic relationship. You are in for a surprise as the story unfolds to a shocking end. 

#VYRLOriginals #TuBhiSatayaJayega #AlyJasmin

Ye jo jagah jagah dard ki kahaniyaan sunata hai
Ye jo jagah jagah dard ki kahaniyaan sunata hai
Farebi hai ,sab jhooth batata hai
 
Toda jayega tu bhi toda jayega, 
meri tarah tu bhi chhoda jayega
Toda jayega tu bhi toda jayega, 
meri tarah tu bhi chhoda jayega
Kitno ke dil barbaad karega, 
aag lagayega
Tu sach mein kitna behaya hai, 
sach ye saamne aayega
Tune bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
Haaye bada rulaya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi rulaya jayega
Tune bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
 
Kitno ko seene se lagaya, meri tarha saath sulaya
Kitno ko seene se lagaya, meri tarha saath sulaya
Aankhon mein teri paani nahi hai, 
sabko tune kitna rulaya
Isse sharm na aayegi zara bhi, 
baaz na aayega
Tu sach mein kitna behaya hai, 
sach ye saamne aayega
 
Haaye bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
Jana bada rulaya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi rulaya jayega
Tune bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
 
Kitno ko hai maara, 
jeete ji haan tune
Khaab dikhaye pehle, 
phir khaab unhi se cheene
Tujhko to pata hai , 
hota haan khuda hai
Muh kaise dikhlayega, 
haaye bada
 
Haaye bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
Tune bada rulaya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi rulaya jayega
Tune bada sataya hai mujhe ja, 
tu bhi sataya jayega
 
Jab tak jee rahi hoon ye dua karti hoon

snippet.title: Kareeb | Goldie Sohel | Siddharth Nigam | Ashi Singh | Vishal D |Kunaal V |Official Video |TM Music
snippet.description:
When a crush leads to playful flirting and ends up as love! 
This is what Kareeb is about. A fun, peppy song, composed by Goldie Sohel to Kunaal Vermaa's lyrics, sung by Vishal Dadlani, will appeal to millennials and also create nostalgia for many from older generations.

#Kareeb #SiddharthNigam #AshiSingh

----------------------------------------------------------------
Music Composed by Goldie Sohel
Written by Kunaal Vermaa
Singer - Vishal Dadlani

Music Produced and Arranged by Goldie Sohel
Sound Designer - Manash Borthakur

Guitars - Ishan Das 
Bass - Himangshu Borah 
Saxophones - I D Rao 
Backing Vocals Arranged and designed by Shreya Phukan

Vishal's Vocals recorded at YRF studios by Vijay Dayal
Vocal Design and Edit by DJ Phukan
Instruments and Backing Vocals recorded at Neo Sound by Pranjal Borah

Mixed by Pankaj Borah at Neo Sound 
Mix Assistant - Pranjal Borah 

Mastered by Sunny M.R.

Video:
Featuring - Siddharth Nigam & Ashi Singh
Video Director - United White Flag - Ramji Gulati
Choreographed by - Shashank Dogra
Casting by - Purple Star Entertainment - Forum Vaghela
DOP - Rahul Arora
Editor - Varun Arora
VFX - Vishal Panchal
Drone - Tanish Arora
Styling - Dharti Gulati
Production - Akshay Kapoor (Aay Kay Dubai)
Makeup & Hair - Ishan Malhotra
Photography - Anish Ajmera
Team UWF - Aashish Prasad, Dr. Deep, Mr. Hit
----------------------------------------------------------------

‚ô™Stream the Full Song Here‚ô™

Amazon Music - Apple Music - Gaana - Spotify - Wynk - Jio Saavn - Hungama - Resso - YouTube Music.

Connect with the song: https://tmmusic.fanlink.to/Kareeb

----------------------------------------------------------------
Lyrics :

Dekha tune
Dekha Maine
Chori Chori Yun to sau dafa
Sau Dafa

Jeele thoda
Ho na jaaye
Baton baton mein hi yu subha
Yu Subha
Sau baaton ki baat hai ek main hu tera.. toh kya sochna
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb

Aaya tu jab se nazron mein
Maine fir khwab dekha na
Hoga kal se ye khabron mein
Teri haan ki bachi hai deriyaan
Tu rahega mere zikron mein
Ab kabhi koi hoga na
Keh na paau chaahe lafzon mein
Phir bhi karta rahunga main bayaan
Tu chaahiye baaki Kar li hai
Maine saari tai yaariyan..
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
Koi karke bahana
Aajana mere kareeb
----------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: LIVE - Full Moon Meditation with Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar | Health | Happiness | Healing
snippet.description:
Join the world's most effortless meditation program - Sahaj Samadhi Meditation : Online with Bhanumathi Narasimhan from 7-9th May on http://aoliv.in/meditation



Maximize happiness, health & immunity. Cut down stress, anxiety, and depression! Learn the powerful breathing technique Sudarshan Kriya, along with Pranayama, Yoga, Meditation and Practical Tips for everyday living in the online Meditation and Breath workshop (The Art of Living Happiness Program).

 Register now ūüĎČūüŹĹ https://aolf.in/ytonlinehp

About Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar

Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar is a world-renowned humanitarian, spiritual leader, and an ambassador of peace and human values. Through his life and work, Gurudev has inspired millions around the world with a vision of a stress-free and violence-free world.
Gurudev founded The Art of Living, a non-profit organization that is engaged in stress-management and service initiatives. The programs designed by Gurudev empower people with techniques and tools to live a deeper and blissful life.

#GurudevSriSriRaviShankar #ArtofLiving

Stay tuned to Screen Scene Media for more updates on the movie.

Song Lyrics 

 R Tu Muh P Kuch Hai 
Or Piche Kuch Or Hai 
   Do Char Facklanduva Mai
  Chaale Tera Jor Hai  
Bhai Bhai Kehke Seli maar kar Gya   
Ib Saini Dhokebazi Ni ni

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

Rrr Meri Photova Ne Paad Ke kai Chode Hore hai 
Rrr Kute Apne ilakya MaiRrr Makha  Ghode Hore hai
Amit tt Tu Sidha Hoke Takra Liye Rr Par Jall Saji Nii

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

Rr badmashi Ki Speech Thodi Makha Kam Diya Kar 
Rr Makha Tadke Badama Gelya Dudh Liya Kar 
Rrr Pani K Tu Bhar K Dram Rakhe se.  
Rrr Gani Hanji Hhanji Ni 

Rr Hero Jhal Dat Le Time Kaad Le  Rrr Makha Hawa Baji Niii

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS : DC vs RCB 22nd IPL Match HIGHLIGHTS | Royal Challengers Bangalore won by 1 run
snippet.description:
HIGHLIGHTS : DC vs RCB 22nd IPL Match HIGHLIGHTS | Royal Challengers Bangalore won by 1 run
#dcvsrcb #22ndmatch #highlights
The 22nd and most exciting match of IPL 2021 was played between Rishabh Pant's Delhi Capitals and Virat Kohli's Royal Challengers Bangalore. In this match, Delhi captain Rishabh Pant won the toss and decided to bowl and Bengaluru team got batting first. Invited for After that, two Bangalore batsmen came to the opening to field runs with the intention of raining runs. Bengaluru captain Virat Kohli and Devadatta Padikal were expecting a strong opening partnership for the Bangalore team, both opening the innings in the same manner. But their partnership did not last long and in the fourth over of the innings, Avesh Khan gave the biggest blow to the Bangalore team. Bengaluru team captain Virat Kohli was bowled clean by Avesh Khan, Maktapan Virat Kohli was able to score 12 runs in 11 balls. Immediately after that, his fellow player Devdutt Padikal was also bowled clean by Ishant Sharma. Devdutt Padyakkal was able to score just 17 runs in 14 balls. Bengaluru's team had lost two of their opener batsmen within the first Powerplay. But then both of them, Rajat Patidar and Glenn Maxwell, who came to bat, handled Bengaluru's dagmagi innings, both of them took the Bangalore team to 60 runs by the 8th over of the innings. But then in the ninth over of the innings, Bengaluru's team suffered another major blow. Delhi spin bowler Amit Mishra got Glenn Maxwell caught by Steve Smith. The set-up Maxwell scored 25 runs in 20 balls for the Bangalore team. Due to the fall of a big wicket like Maxwell, Delhi bowlers were seen dominating Bangalore's batting. But the bowlers of Delhi did not know about the storm coming forward and the name of that storm was AB de Villiers. After losing all the top order batsmen, the Bangalore team was now under pressure. But then AB de Villiers formed a wonderful partnership with set batsman Rajat Patidar. Both of them did not let a single wicket fall of the team of Bengaluru till the 14th over of the innings. The same between these two also completed their half-century partnership. But then in the 15th over of the innings, Akshar Patel got Rajat Patidar caught by Steve Smith. Rajat Patidar, looking in excellent form, was able to score 31 off 22 balls. But AB de Villiers started to open his hands after the dismissal of Rajat Patidar and the Delhi bowlers in the final overs in AB de Villiers, called Superman of Cricket. In the 20th over of the two innings, AB de Villiers hit Marcus Stoinis for 23 runs in the same over. Friends AB de Villiers scored 75 runs in 42 balls in this match and thanks to this innings of de Villiers, Bengaluru team put a huge target of 171 runs ahead of Delhi team. Delhi's two best in-form opener batsmen came into the fray. This pair of Shakhar Dhawan and Prithvi Shaw gave Delhi the team a lot of expectations, but in the third over of the innings, Shikhar Dhawan, who scored the most runs in this IPL, was defeated Jameson got caught by Chahal. Shikhar Dhawan was able to score just 6 runs in 7 balls. Steven Smith, who came to bat after Shikhar Dhawan, was caught by Mohammad Shivraj at the hands of AB de Villiers. Steve Smith was also able to score only 4 runs in 5 balls. After the Delhi team also suffered two setbacks in the initial over, the pressure was now on the shoulders of captain Rishabh Pant. Rishabh Pant came to bat after Steve Smith was dismissed. Prithvi tried to manage Delhi's innings in association with the show. But then in the eighth over of the innings, the team of Prithvi Shaw got a third big blow to the Delhi team. Prithvi Shaw was caught by Harshal Patel at the hands of AB de Villiers. Earth Sha was able to score 21 runs in 18 balls. But then Marcus Stoinis, who came to bat after him, played well with captain Rishabh Pant. Both of them handled Dagmagi Delhi's innings first and then, after being set, started washing the Bangalore bowlers. Both of them did not let one wicket fall of Delhi team till the 12th over of the innings. But then Harshal Patel, who came for the 13th over of

snippet.title: Piyu Bole - Janaki Omkumar | GMC Thrissur
snippet.description:
A video done during lockdown last year ūüėĆ
- To propagate the need of love to oneself.

Initially, it was just a humble attempt at doing a choreograpy by @manishmandy @FAMOUS FAMILY but after the first rate editing from Rahul Venu, I couldn't give it a better caption than Balram versus Tharadas. ūüėāūüėā

But on further thought, jokes aside (yeah my cheesy acting), it is essential that you love and seek happiness in yourself to heal yourself and the people around you. Stop looking for the one. Be the one. Else you'll be just depending on another person to fill the voids within you. ūü§∑‚Äć

Self love doesn't mean being narcissistic, or those extra selfies, it's about working on your relationship with yourself, through all the highs and lows and still be able to treat yourself with compassion and respect.And then one would never want to kill oneself. 

Secondarily, you will not let anyone walk through your mind with their feet dirty like MK Gandhi rightly said.And that's, the island to swim to.ūüćāūüćÄ

#piyubole#selflove#quarantinedance  #indiandancers#dancersofindia india#whackingdance

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: "PM Sir, Please Make A Phone Call": Arvind Kejriwal On Oxygen Crisis
snippet.description:
Covid-19 News: Prime Minister Narendra Modi met with the Chief Minister of the 10 states worst hit by the deadly second wave of Covid on a day India touched a new record of 3.32 lakh Covid cases and 2,263 deaths in 24 hours. In an interaction that was live on TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal highlighted the crippling oxygen crisis in hospitals in the capital. "Please sir, we need your guidance," Mr Kejriwal said to the Prime Minister.

Hi Guys! The Institute Of Chartered Accountant Of India has decided to postpone the CA Intermediate & Final exams which are scheduled to commence from 21st May 2021. ICAI has taken this decision due to the prevailing situation amid the coronavirus pandemic in the country.

snippet.title: Simple Ken Podcast | EP 27 -Internal Dialogue Feat. Kanan Gill, Prashasti Singh & Shreeja Chaturvedi
snippet.description:
Simple Ken is hosted by Kenny Sebastian, A stand up comedian known for his observational humour and quirky stage presence.

A simple podcast about tackling the weekly conflicts of a comedian. 

A strictly "no advice" podcast.

____________________________

This is what I always wanted to do with Simpleken. Have a lot of comics together discussing purely our writing process. I am very blessed to be in this field while being surround by such talented minds. To be able to share ideas and concepts with each other is probably the highest privilege I enjoy. We discussed our insecurities, our personal crisis and also our guilty pleasures! Hope you guys can take something away from it and it hopefully adds to your creative and problem solving! Also there was a 10 minute segment on toilet humour which I removed to be empathetic towards some listeners who might find that jarring. 

You can Tweet/Youtube/ Instagram your questions/topics/queries discuss for the next week episode using the hashtag #simpleken.

0:00 - Introduction

2:29 - Individual Comedy Styles

17:27 - Personal Rules of Comedy

28:48 - Comedic Voice and Personality

41:13 - Worst Interview Questions

50:47 - Outro

Simple Ken is available on all major podcasts platforms for free including Apple Podcasts, Google Podcasts, Spotify, Stitcher, Gaana and Soundcloud.

Podcast Website: https://www.simpleken.com/

Merchandise & Live Shows: https://www.kennysebastian.com

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kennethseb

Podcast Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/simplekenpodcast

Twitter: https://twitter.com/knowkenny

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/standupkenny

Podcast Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/simplekenpodcast

snippet.description:
Preeto and Harak Singh get emotional on hearing Harman introduce himself while Soumya gets furious with him for trying to mislead her family. Will the incident create another misunderstanding between Harman and Soumya?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

Gary Vaynerchuk is a Belarusian-American entrepreneur, author, speaker, and prominent Internet personality. He is a co-founder of the restaurant reservation software company, Resy and Empathy Wines. Gary Vee is now more known for his work in digital marketing and social media as the chairman of New York-based communications company VaynerX & VaynerMedia.

This has been a dream podcast for me. Been following Gary Vee for years and having him on this podcast felt surreal. 

We spoke about how the world‚Äôs gonna look post-pandemic, world evolution with NFTs, the future of social media, and a piece of very powerful advice for entrepreneurs and content creators. 

Don‚Äôt miss out on this one!

snippet.title: Ek Bhutiya Train Ki Sacchi Kahani - Paranormal Story of A Train (Zanetti Train)- AMF Ep 63
snippet.description:
Zanetti train story is a popular Italian urban legend. The story is fascinating. The story tells that  the train left Rome and went through the mountain tunnel in Lombard but it disappeared with the passengers inside the tunnel. It is one of the best paranormal stories.

Let us explore the story in this episode of AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) series.

AMF (Amazing Micro Facts) is a mini knowledge series by Rajesh Kumar AKA FactTechz where we explore various amazing facts related to our amazing world. Know how enigmatic and astonishing our world is! This is the episode 63 of AMF.

Enjoy the show!

snippet.title: MUTTON SCRAMBLED EGG | Biggest Scrambled Egg Cooking with Mutton Keema Meat | Lamb mixed Egg Recipe
snippet.description:
Today in our village we cook Scrambled Egg Omelette Recipe by adding boneless mutton meat with egg. We use the big vessel to make this biggest scrambled egg. We also use hand ground masalas to make this egg recipe yummy.

Finally, we eat these eggs with our favorite mutton recipe.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3152 - Sodhi Ne Bhide Ko Nehlaya! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | ŗ§§ŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ§ē ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§Ļŗ§§ŗ§ĺ
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri

Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 25 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara‚Äôs birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can‚Äôt tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

localized.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

#HaleemHungama #StreetByte #BajajElectronics

Gopal Meat Foods
Gali Veedhi 
Near China Bazar Street
Tirupathi 

+91 832-8096406

Guess what guys?! WE'RE BACK! SEASON 3 OF HALEEM HUNGAMA with @bajajelectronicsindia IS OFFICIALLY HERE!! 

*The rules are as follows:*
- The contestants will take selfies of themselves holding a serving of Haleem and post it to their social media and use the hashtags *#BajajElectronics #StreetByte #Sillymonks #HaleemHungama
- A total of *30 members* will be chosen at the end of the contest. Prizes will be distributed to them over a period of *six days.* 
- *Five winners* per day will be called. Gift hampers will be distributed at *selected Bajaj Electronics stores*. The selection of winners and prize distribution will happen during the last few days of the campaign
(The more number of entries, the higher chance of you winning!) 

So get clicking!

Bajaj Ectronics  is one of Hyderabad's most premier chain of consumer electronics stores.
It started off as a dream in the year 1983 with the first Bajaj Electronics branch at Hyderabad. We earned the trust of the locals and grew from strength to strength, to what is now a chain of the most genuine electronic stores across twin cities, offering quality service at the best price. An extension to those services is this online outlet where you can choose from a wide display of the latest gadgets & appliances while availing some crazy offers on the side! It‚Äôs faster. It‚Äôs smarter!

What gives us the edge over other online stores is our presence in the city. More than 85 outlets are spread across the length and breadth of the city which offers the following advantages to its online buyers:

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 3 | Positive Approach Rakh Yaar
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

Preparing for UPSC is challenging. It tests not only your knowledge but also your patience. It‚Äôs really important to maintain a positive approach throughout your preparation. But everyone around Abhilash notices that he lacks a positive approach in his personality, which reflects in his answers too. How will Abhilash cope with it? Will he be able to keep his approach positive?

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki

Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar

Associate Director: Himali Shah

DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #87: 23.72% of the total UPSC Aspirants wanted to become IAS officers because they wanted to be called ‚ÄúBabu‚ÄĚ so that finally someone will ask them ‚ÄúMele Babu ne thana thaya?‚ÄĚ
-The Description Guy.

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?
